event: Large tenant corp_azimuth was remapped to shard 7, increasing shard-local notification ingress
Oldest message age alert fired for shard 7 while provider probes remained healthy
Initial investigation considered SES and APNS slowdown because workers were retrying sends
Comparison of total queue depth with autoscaler observed depth revealed the autoscaler was undercounting backlog
Recent autoscaler commit and the hot-shard tenant migration were identified as the interacting causes
Worker replicas scaled up and shard 7 backlog began draining
